tasks.name: Project scaffolding
tasks.description: Create pyproject.toml, requirements.txt (dev + prod), pytest.ini or pyproject.toml pytest config, ruff config, mypy config, .gitignore, src/ directory structure (src/factory_simulator/__init__.py), tests/ directory structure (tests/unit/, tests/integration/, tests/spikes/), and a minimal conftest.py. Verify: ruff check passes, mypy src passes (on empty package), pytest discovers test directories.

tasks.name: Spike: Multi-server pymodbus
tasks.description: Build and test 7 concurrent async Modbus TCP servers in one event loop. Each server has its own register map on a unique port. Include multi-slave test (3 UIDs on one port), FC06 rejection for float32 registers, and max 125 register limit. See plans/phase-0-validation-spikes.md Spike 1 for full spec.

tasks.name: Spike: Mosquitto sidecar + paho-mqtt
tasks.description: Build Docker Compose with Mosquitto sidecar and Python paho-mqtt 2.0 publisher. Test 50 msg/s publish with mixed QoS 0/1, retained messages, LWT, and client-side buffering during broker restart. See plans/phase-0-validation-spikes.md Spike 2 for full spec.

tasks.name: Spike: asyncua multiple instances
tasks.description: Build and test 3 concurrent asyncua OPC-UA servers in one event loop. Each server has its own node tree on a unique port. Test subscriptions, data change notifications at 500ms, string NodeIDs, variable attributes, StatusCode propagation, and memory baseline. See plans/phase-0-validation-spikes.md Spike 3 for full spec.

tasks.name: Document spike results
tasks.description: Write docs/validation-spikes.md with pass/fail per spike, performance numbers, library quirks, reference code samples, and library versions. Clean up spike code into tests/spikes/ directory. Verify all spike tests pass from pytest.
